text.title: Vision Accessibility — Alt Text & Scene Description Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Alt text starts with 'image of' / 'picture of'.
antipattern.root-cause: VLM default phrasing leaked through; no post-processor strips it.
antipattern.fix: Add deterministic post-strip step; reject and regenerate on detection.

antipattern.symptom: Alt text describes what is in the image without any tie to page purpose.
antipattern.root-cause: Prompt did not include surrounding heading / section.
antipattern.fix: Always inject {page_heading, section_purpose, url_slug} into the prompt; fail validation if absent.

antipattern.symptom: Generated alt cites '$23.4M revenue' that does not match the underlying data.
antipattern.fix: Run a second-pass validator that re-extracts numbers and rejects on mismatch.
